summary: Completed comprehensive testing of extended Shared Project GPT app with ChatGPT-like attachments and URL reading functionality. All core features are working correctly including multi-format file uploads (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD), URL sources, keyword-based retrieval with citations, and project isolation.
passed_tests: PDF file upload with text extraction and chunking
DOCX file upload with text extraction and chunking
TXT file upload with text extraction and chunking
MD file upload with text extraction and chunking
URL source addition with HTML content extraction
List sources in project with proper metadata display
Delete source functionality with cleanup
Set active sources for chat context
Get active sources for chat
Send message with source context - AI uses document content
Citations in AI responses with source names and chunk indices
Keyword-based retrieval - AI correctly identifies relevant content
Project isolation - sources from different projects are isolated
Source isolation between projects
Error handling for unsupported file types (proper rejection)
Error handling for invalid URLs (proper rejection)
Error handling for non-existent URLs (proper rejection)
Sources panel UI shows all source types (file and URL)
Checkboxes to toggle source active status with visual indication
Upload File button works correctly
URL input and Add URL button work correctly
Citations display under assistant messages with proper formatting
Auto-activation of uploaded sources
Source deletion with confirmation dialog
Multiple file type icons and metadata display
Collapsible sources panel with proper toggle functionality
AI responses reference document content when sources are active
Keyword-based ranking selects most relevant chunks
Clean source management interface with file sizes and chunk counts

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all major UI flows working, minor project creation modal issue)
